chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.S-635 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 03-11-2025 Mr. Ghulam Rasool Narejo, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This is an application under Section 491 Cr.P.C. filed by the applicant Abdul Hameed, stating therein that his wife Mst. Tahira and his children, including Sawera, Maira, Najma, and Mohsin, are illegally confined by her brothers, namely Rameez, Aftab, and Altaf, and he prays for issuance of rule nisi. At the first instance, notice was issued to the learned APG and the private respondents. Today, Mst. Tahira along with her children is present and submits that the applicant, being her husband, had made her life miserable and used to maltreat her on petty matters. Therefore, she was residing happily with respondents No.4 to 6, being her brothers, and no one has illegally confined her or her children. Heard and perused the record. Prior to this, CMA No.S-582/2025 was filed by Mst. Tahira, which was disposed of on her consent to go and reside with the applicant being her husband. Since there is matrimonial dispute between the parties, the applicant has filed a guardianship case, which is sub-judice before the Court of Family Judge-II, Khairpur. Learned counsel for the respondents submits that Mst. Tahira has also filed a suit for maintenance, which is sub-judice before the Court of Family Judge, Sukkur. The parties are directed to approach the said Courts for the relief sought. Accordingly, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands disposed of in the above terms.
The parties are directed to approach the said Courts for the relief sought. Accordingly, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE SulemenKhan/PA
